Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Oh, there you are, Aigis! Do you have a minute?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Metis wanted me to pass on a message to you. Um...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}She said she wanted to show you something and asked if you could come to Paulownia Mall.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Oops... Sorry, I just got a little too excited.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Anyway, you should get going. She's been waiting for you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}At Fuuka-san's insistence,[n]I made my way to Paulownia Mall.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I-I don't think she's up to anything... N-Not anything bad, at least?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I'm sure she just wants to spend time with you! At least, that's my impression.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}So you should go and see her. She's been waiting for you for a while now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After being pressured by Fuuka-san,[n]I ended up going to Paulownia Mall...[n]{f 1 1}
